description: DaVinci AI Brand DNA - Premium UI/UX Design System with component mappings

typography.stat_value: text-4xl md:text-7xl font-mono font-bold text-orange-500 tracking-tighter

PhaseCard.description: Represents a project phase or milestone
PhaseCard.structure: p-6 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md hover:border-orange-500/50 transition-all duration-300

content.title: text-lg font-bold tracking-tight text-white
content.status_dot: w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 or bg-orange-500

InsightCard.structure: p-6 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/5 to-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-md

content.title: text-base font-bold text-white tracking-tight
content.tag: inline-block px-2 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-orange-500 border border-orange-500/30 rounded

StatBox.structure: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md

content.value: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-mono font-bold text-orange-500 tracking-tighter
content.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-white/60 mt-2

PersonaCard.structure: p-6 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md

content.avatar: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-500 to-orange-700 mb-4
content.name: text-xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight
content.pain_points: ul list-disc ml-4 text-white/70 text-sm mt-3
content.quote: italic text-white/60 border-l-2 border-orange-500 pl-4 mt-4

TechStack.item: px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono text-white/80 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-full

VisionBlock.structure: relative p-8 rounded-xl border border-orange-500/30 bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-500/10 to-transparent backdrop-blur-md overflow-hidden
VisionBlock.decorative: absolute -top-10 -right-10 w-40 h-40 bg-orange-500/20 rounded-full blur-3xl

layout_patterns.Hero-Statement: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh] text-center

borders.gradient: border border-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500/50 to-transparent bg-clip-border

animations.slide_up: transition-transform duration-300 ease-out translate-y-4 to translate-y-0
